title: Simple Vivecraft
description: Modpack allowing for easy VR gameplay with a lot of room to expand
body:
**This modpack is the fastest way to play Minecraft in VR without creating own modpack!**

Simple Vivecraft uses mod Vivecraft, that you can read more about Here, and ImmersiveMC mod that you can get from Here, and also some optimalization mods with Voice Chat. This setup allows to play without needing to download any additional mods, and also gives much room to expand. 

**------------------ IMPORTATNT ------------------** 

The VR part of this modpack (and entire part of Vivecraft) is working on SteamVR, so to play you need to have installed and open Steam and SteamVR app, then just ingame click (When your headset is connected with SteamVR app) button to turn on the VR mode, and wait for the game to load again. 

**Modpack gives automatic setup, so you can just join game and play (ALMOST FULL SETUP).**

This Modpack gives as much of controls configured as it can, but for now the controlers keybinds are unavaible to upload, I'm working on a mod to fix this problem, but for now if you want to change something, please use this article about changing controler configuration on SteamVR.

**Multiplayer Info:**
Modpack is stable to allow you to play on normal minecraft servers (but can allow some antycheats, so be safe)
If you want to play Lan or on Simple Hostings with your friends, then they will need to use this modpack or just the Vivecraft mod to see your movement.

**Using this modpack as a base of a custom one:**
If you want to use this modpack as a base for a custom one that you would upload, please if you have to then add a link to this modpack so others could play on original too <3
